title: Commuting Varieties for Nilpotent Radicals
journal: Proceedings of the Edinburgh Mathematical Society
abstract: AbstractLetUbe the unipotent radical of a Borel subgroup of a connected reductive algebraic groupG, which is defined over an algebraically closed fieldk. In this paper, we extend work by Goodwin and Röhrle concerning the commuting variety of Lie(U) for Char(k) = 0 to fields whose characteristic is good forG.
